_notes: Baseline for the chorus-test-revA routing benchmark (Issue #2611).
Source: curator-suggested seed values aggregated from issues #2295,
Update procedure (see docs/benchmark.md): after merging this issue,
run the benchmark-routing nightly job, inspect the produced JSON,
and overwrite this file with the new measured values.  Justify any
decrease in nets_fully_routed or increase in nets_unrouted in the
nets_total = 46 is the multi-pad signal-net count from the v18 PCB
after skipping the five power/ground nets in the case config
The 8-net structural floor (nets_unrouted) is the persistent
'0/N pads' set called out in #2595 -- DAC_CLK plus seven small
nets in the U5/U7/U9 cluster.  This is the hard regression
assertion: if it grows to 9, CI fails.
routing_time_sec=1900 is conservative; runs at HEAD 40f5fbd8 (see
drift before warning/error, so transient slowness shouldn't break
